$comment: This file controls how scripts/run-migrations.ps1 behaves in CI.
Set simulateTimeout to true to make the pipeline fail with a realistic
command-timeout error message. Set it to false (or remove the flag) to
- Initial commit: simulateTimeout=false → pipeline succeeds (green build)
- Final commit (the 'bad' one): simulateTimeout=true → pipeline fails
- The agent's rollback PR will revert this file back to false.
name: 20260515_AddCustomerLoyalty
